Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xA000 "INTENSITY-07D5-A000" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $07d5 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Intensity.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Initial breakpoint to use for dumping (i.e. once game has loaded) is $A11E. Added an init routine at $07D5 to set some necessary zero page values. Also added keypress and port 2 fire read routine at $9A40 to skip intro which was originally shown during the loading process. Patched looping jump at $A11B to point to this new routine instead.
